# Ironclad Plumbing

> Ironclad Plumbing is a residential plumbing company serving Austin and the Greater Austin metro. The site publishes service pages, city pages, written guarantees, FAQs, and homeowner guides for comparing plumbing work before booking.

## Canonical Site

- Site: https://ironcladtexas.com
- Business: Ironclad Plumbing
- Market: Austin, Texas and Greater Austin service areas
- Phone: (833) 597-1932

## Core Pages

- Home: https://ironcladtexas.com/
- About: https://ironcladtexas.com/about
- Guarantees: https://ironcladtexas.com/guarantees
- Contact: https://ironcladtexas.com/contact
- Plumbing services hub: https://ironcladtexas.com/plumbing
- Service areas hub: https://ironcladtexas.com/service-area
- FAQ hub: https://ironcladtexas.com/faq
- Guides hub: https://ironcladtexas.com/guides

## High-Value Service Pages

- Plumbing repairs: https://ironcladtexas.com/plumbing/repairs
- Drain cleaning: https://ironcladtexas.com/plumbing/drain-cleaning
- Sewer line services: https://ironcladtexas.com/plumbing/sewer-services
- Water heaters: https://ironcladtexas.com/plumbing/water-heaters
- Tankless water heaters: https://ironcladtexas.com/plumbing/tankless-water-heaters
- Leak detection: https://ironcladtexas.com/plumbing/leak-detection
- Gas line services: https://ironcladtexas.com/plumbing/gas-line-services
- Emergency plumbing: https://ironcladtexas.com/plumbing/emergency

## Homeowner Guides

- What plumbing should cost in Austin: https://ironcladtexas.com/guides/what-plumbing-costs-austin
- Questions to ask before hiring a plumber: https://ironcladtexas.com/guides/questions-to-ask-your-plumber
- Plumber red flags: https://ironcladtexas.com/guides/plumber-red-flags
- How plumbing pricing works: https://ironcladtexas.com/guides/how-plumbing-pricing-works

## Crawling Notes

- Sitemap index: https://ironcladtexas.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots policy: https://ironcladtexas.com/robots.txt
- Public marketing and educational pages are intended to be crawlable.
- API, preview, staging, and test paths are not intended for indexing.
